case_title: LINDA HUDSON et al VS. STEPHEN VUCOVICH et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (*****COMPLAINT IS STRICKEN AS TO PLAINTIFF JOHN SPANGLER PER ORDER ENTERED ON 6/12/12.*****) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUDSON, LINDA SPANGLER, JOHN (COMPLAINT STRICKEN) AS TO DEFENDANT VUCOVICH, STEPHEN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-18-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-03-2012

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-25-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF JOHN SPANGLER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-18-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-29-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-07-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-29-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF SPANGLER, JOHN (COMPLAINT STRICKEN)
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT AS TO PLAINTIFF JOHN SPANGLER FILED ON 12/15/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUDSON, LINDA SPANGLER, JOHN (COMPLAINT STRICKEN) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPANGLER, JOHN (COMPLAINT STRICKEN) HEARING SET FOR JAN-25-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-07-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
